title: What's Going On With Block Shares?
text: Block shares are making headlines for all the wrong reasons today, with short-seller Hindenburg Research raising red flags surrounding the company. Whose side are you on?

title: It's Time for 2 Vital Healthcare Businesses to Shine for Investors
text: Welltower and Ventas got hammered during the pandemic because of their senior housing assets. That's changing in a big way.
